harvest_messages.message_182: but in order to understand why the letter "s" in the description "shit's gone wild" was not capitalized, you first have to understand the sentence itself. Firstly, anyone who happens to read this phrase which acts as a caption for TS-VI: Fool's Ghouls (the level in question) is going to notice the rather particular word "shit" (a vulgar form of the word feces). This is very important as the mod "Plants vs. Zombies 2: Alternate UniverZ" appears to be a professional and well-made remake of a game tilted "Plants vs. Zombies 2: It's About Time", the sequel of the hit game, also known as Plants vs. Zombies, developed by Popcap back in 2009, hence the "Plants vs. Zombies 2" part in the name of the mod itself. Furthermore, the level placement plays a minor part but still important about reminding how crucial TS-VI: Fool's Ghouls is - it is placed just right after the penultimate level of The Springscapade holiday quest, which implies that the importance of this level is not to be underestimated. For the word "shit" to appears in such a polished position and place, it must hint that the level mentioned is in fact not a normal level and not what you will expect. The purpose was to in fact add humorous value while warning the player about the upcoming event. The comedic value was further skillfully enhanced by Poss (one of the Alternate UniverZ developers who is responsible for the creation of all holiday quests) by the fact there is no capitalization nor punctual. This is most likely a reference to how many people in our modern society communicate with each other via text in informal conversation.

harvest_messages.message_228: . The line "I've lost my magic" originated from Level 11 of the Plants vs. Zombies 2's 2022 Feastivus Thymed Event, where it was said by Wall-nut. It is widely known as one of the most iconic and well-done dramatic scenes in the entire modern Plants vs. Zombies 2 era, as it perfectly expresses Wall-nut's grief and depression throughout his story arc of existential crisis caused by Nutcracker Zombie's unexpected appearance, especially after all the emotional build-ups shown in dialogues of the event's previous levels. The developers of Plants vs. Zombies 2: Reflourished has taken this into account, and has allowed multiple characters to reference this legendary line in the Spongebob Age Thymed Event, one of the greatest events to have ever existed, in order to commemorate Wall-nut for his unwavering dedication and hard work throughout his days of battling zombies, as well as the greatness of this single line when used in literally any context, as then proved by its usage everywhere in the Plants vs. Zombies community. It is undeniable that both PopCap Games and and the developers of the Reflourished Mod have done a fantastic job at expressing their deepest of emotions through these uncomplicated lines of speech.

. Posting this on behalf of Slimeakku, but she is in dire need of everyone's help. She hasn't been doing good financially, bills have been piling and her house has been falling apart and needs repairs, as well as possibly being out of a job this year. She's asking for anyone's help to support her on GoFundMe, no matter how big or small the donation is. She's also opened up YT Memberships for anyone else who wants to donate in any other way.

Here is the GoFundMe: https://gofund.me/8bd34e1c3

harvest_messages.message_424:
, so I talked with some individuals about the resource management for Omnibird and we came with a conclusion.
Everyone will be allowed to harvest Omnibird's mfws.
However, a big However, the mfws made by {brd} and {abs} are strictly NOT ALLOWED to be harvested. (same goes for the _horribles that I have done in past but never made the cut in Omnibird). People that harvest those banned mfws (included the mfw makers themselves) and whose inventories contain those mfws will be taken down manually, resulting in a strike. I handled one just as a warning for now and the strike is gone. The mfw makers and these collectors have 1 month to remove (or transfer for CC.) the mfws before this thing goes into effect.
I didn't wanted to do this but, you people don't realize how much I hate thieves and assholes combined in one.
